Metadata.title: KeroDev Starter
Metadata.description: Production-ready Next.js starter with full Arabic/English RTL+LTR support

Home.headline: Ship your Arabic project without the setup pain
Home.subheadline: A production-ready starter with full RTL/LTR support, translations, dark mode, and a wired database — ready from line one.

rtl.title: RTL + LTR
rtl.desc: Full Arabic and English support using Tailwind logical properties throughout.

darkMode.title: Dark & Light Mode
darkMode.desc: Dark mode ready with next-themes and flash-free hydration.

prisma.title: Prisma ORM
prisma.desc: Prisma connected to PostgreSQL with a correct singleton pattern for dev.

i18n.title: next-intl v4
i18n.desc: Full i18n with routing, metadata, and static rendering configured.

tailwind.title: Tailwind v4
tailwind.desc: CSS-first config with a complete design token system for colors and type.

typescript.title: TypeScript Strict
typescript.desc: Fully typed including locales, translation keys, and Prisma models.

About.title: About the Starter
About.description: Everything built right from the start.
About.body: This template is designed to be a serious starting point for any Arabic or multilingual web project. No placeholders, no TODOs — everything actually works.
